# Andrés González Ortega

> Actuario por la UNAM (Facultad de Ciencias) y científico de datos. Construye herramientas actuariales en producción: tarificación de seguros con datos de la CNSF, valuación de reservas bajo la LISF/CUSF, agentes de IA sobre regulación mexicana y plataformas de datos en GCP. Sitio bilingüe (español / inglés).

Andrés González Ortega is a UNAM-trained actuary and data scientist based in Mexico. He builds production actuarial tools: insurance pricing on CNSF data, reserve valuation under Mexican regulation (LISF/CUSF), AI agents over regulatory text, and data platforms on GCP. This site (gonor.me) is his portfolio, blog, and interactive artifacts, in Spanish and English.

## Key pages

- [Inicio / Home](https://gonor.me/): projects, skills, education, contact.
- [Blog (ES)](https://gonor.me/blog/): technical posts on actuarial science, data engineering, quant finance, and applied math.
- [Blog (EN)](https://gonor.me/en/blog/): English versions of the posts.
- [Artefactos / Artifacts](https://gonor.me/artifacts/): interactive HTML tools and technical notes (PDFs).

## Flagship projects

- SIMA: actuarial engine implementing Lee-Carter mortality projection and commutation tables.
- GMM Explorer: major-medical (Gastos Médicos Mayores) insurance pricing on CNSF data.
- Asistente de Regulación (LISF/CUSF): RAG agent that reasons over Mexican insurance law with a cross-reference graph.
- Cartera de Autos: auto-insurance loss analysis (GLM, IBNR, Monte Carlo, fraud detection).
- Plataformas de datos: BigQuery / GCP pipelines and dashboards.
